## 🌿 GitFlow Context

- **Target branch:** `develop` | `release/...` | `main`
- **Release type (if applicable):** `major` | `minor` | `patch`

## 🏷️ Change Type

Check all that apply:

- [ ] `feat`: new feature
- [ ] `fix`: bug fix
- [ ] `refactor`: internal improvement without functional change
- [ ] `docs`: documentation
- [ ] `test`: tests
- [ ] `chore`: maintenance tasks
- [ ] `perf`: performance improvement
- [ ] `build/ci`: build or CI changes
